name: AnnotationModel
summary: This class contains methods and properties used for creating groups in Dynamo.

constructors.name: AnnotationModel(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel>, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Notes.NoteModel>)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Graph.Annotations.AnnotationModel class.

constructors.name: AnnotationModel(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Nodes.NodeModel>, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Notes.NoteModel>, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Graph.Annotations.AnnotationModel>)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Graph.Annotations.AnnotationModel class.

params.name: nodes
params.doc: The nodes that belongs to this group.

params.name: notes
params.doc: The notes that belongs to this group.

params.name: groups
params.doc: The groups that belongs to this group

methods.name: ContainsModel(Dynamo.Graph.ModelBase)
methods.summary: Checks if the provided modelbase belongs to this group.

params.name: modelBase
params.doc: modelbase to check if belongs to this group

methods.name: Deselect
methods.summary: Overriding the Deselect behavior because deselecting the group should deselect the models within that group

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Overriding the Select behavior because selecting the group should select the models within that group

methods.name: UpdateValueCore(Dynamo.Graph.UpdateValueParams)
methods.summary: Group the Models based on Height and Width

returns.doc: the width and height of the last model

properties.name: AnnotationDescriptionText
properties.summary: Group description text

properties.name: AnnotationText
properties.summary: Returns title of the group

properties.name: Background
properties.summary: Returns background of the group

properties.name: DeletedModelBases
properties.summary: DeletedModelBases is used to keep track of deleted / ungrouped models. During Undo operations this is used to get those models that are deleted from the group

properties.name: FontSize
properties.summary: Returns font size of the text of the group

properties.name: GUID
properties.summary: ID of the AnnotationModel, which is unique within the graph.

properties.name: GroupState
properties.summary: Indicates whether the group contains nodes that are in an info/warning/error state. This includes the state of any nodes that are in nested groups.

properties.name: GroupStyleId
properties.summary: Returns the Groupstyle applied

properties.name: HasNestedGroups
properties.summary: Checks if this group contains any nested groups.

properties.name: HasToggledOptionalInPorts
properties.summary: Indicates whether the user manually toggled the visibility of optional input ports. If true, this overrides the global preference setting.

properties.name: HasToggledUnconnectedOutPorts
properties.summary: Indicates whether the user manually toggled the visibility of unconnected output ports. If true, this overrides the global preference setting.

properties.name: Height
properties.summary: Returns the full height of the group. That means ModelAreaHeight + TextBlockHeight

properties.name: HeightAdjustment
properties.summary: Adjustment margin to be added to the height of the group. When set the height of the group will always be set to Height + heightAdjustment

properties.name: InitialHeight
properties.summary: Required to calculate the HEIGHT of a group

properties.name: InitialTop
properties.summary: Required to calculate the TOP position in a group

properties.name: IsCollapsedToMinSize
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the group was manually resized while collapsed

properties.name: IsExpanded
properties.summary: Returns whether or not the group is expanded.

properties.name: IsFrozen
properties.summary: Returns whether or not all nodes in the group are frozen.

properties.name: IsOptionalInPortsCollapsed
properties.summary: Indicates whether optional input ports were manually expanded or collapsed when the graph was last saved. Used only for serialization.

properties.name: IsUnconnectedOutPortsCollapsed
properties.summary: Indicates whether unconnected output ports were manually expanded or collapsed when the graph was last saved. Used only for serialization.

properties.name: IsVisible
properties.summary: Preview visibility of the nodes in a group

properties.name: MinWidthOnCollapsed
properties.summary: Gets or sets the minimum width of the group when it is collapsed. This value equals the combined width of the group's proxy input and output ports.

properties.name: ModelAreaHeight
properties.summary: Returns the height of the area that all model belonging to this group is encapsulated in.

properties.name: Nodes
properties.summary: Returns collection of models (nodes and notes) which the group contains

properties.name: PinnedNode
properties.summary: Optional reference to pinned node This reference will be used in note serialization as note is deserialized from an annotation model

properties.name: Rect
properties.summary: Overriding the Rect from Modelbase This queries the actual RECT of the group. This is required to make the group as ILocatable.

properties.name: Text
properties.summary: Returns text of the group

properties.name: TextBlockHeight
properties.summary: Returns height of the text area of the group

properties.name: TextMaxWidth
properties.summary: Returns the maxWidth of text area of the group

properties.name: UserSetHeight
properties.summary: Indicates the height the user manually set using the resize thumb.

properties.name: UserSetWidth
properties.summary: Indicates the height the user manually set using the resize thumb. Indicates the width the user manually set using the resize thumb. Not necessarily equal to the actual rendered width.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Returns width of the group

properties.name: WidthAdjustment
properties.summary: Adjustment margin to be added to the width of the group. When set the width of the group will always be set to Width + widthAdjustment

properties.name: loadFromXML
properties.summary: Indicates if group properties should be read from xml data

events.name: ModelBaseRequested
events.summary: Triggers when it needs to get the model to add from Workspace
